releaseInfo.releaseNotes: v8.2.0 HERO RELEASE: Context MCP analysis tools added for class/file intelligence and diff-aware before/after analysis. Savant now lets AI agents inspect existing classes, measure refactor impact before and after diffs, treat new code as before=0 after=current, and read updated MCP guide/docs. Previous hero release v8.1.5 remains in release history.
